message:
feat(index): integrate resolution cache into indexer pipeline

Skills with `extends` or `includes` fields now have their fully resolved
content indexed into Tantivy search. This enables searching across
inherited and composed content.

Changes:
- Add ResolutionCache and GitSkillRepository to indexer
- Build SkillRecord from resolved spec for search indexing
- Export GitSkillRepository from core module
- Export SkillRecord from storage module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
